Article Title: Madame Tussauds: Madame Tussauds London unveils ‘Icons of India’ with Bollywood, cricket stars
Article Text:
This summer, Madame Tussauds will display Bollywood and Indian cricket stars.





Madame Tussauds London is hosting a special two-month showcase called 'Icons of India' featuring 13 wax figures of leading Bollywood actors and Indian cricket stars.The limited-time experience begins on Friday, from May 1 and will end on June 30. The attraction’s awards party zone will be transformed into a space inspired by Indian culture, spotlighting the global appeal of Hindi cinema and cricket.Visitors will be able to pose with some of the biggest names in Indian entertainment, including Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone, Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Amitabh Bachchan and Hrithik Roshan. The lineup also features Katrina Kaif, Madhuri Dixit and Ranveer Singh The experience will also include cricket icons Sachin Tendulkar and Virat Kohli, with Kohli’s figure brought in from Bangkok. Additional figures of Ranbir Kapoor, Aishwarya Rai Bachchan and Kajal Aggarwal will also be displayed, travelling from other international Madame Tussauds locations.Officials said the initiative aims to celebrate the growing global popularity of Indian cinema and cricket while strengthening cultural ties between India and the UK. The high commission of India in London described the showcase as a reflection of the shared cultural connect between the two countries, bringing “the spirit of India to the heart of London.”
Article Summary: Madame tussauds london is hosting a special two-month showcase called 'icons of india' the limited-time experience begins on friday, from may 1 and will end on june 30. Shah rukh khan, deepika padukone, priyanka chopra jonas, amitabh bachchan and hrithik roshan will be displayed.

Article Title: Caitlin Clark sends 3-word response mocking Indiana Fever’s PR nightmare following AI-assisted post
Article Text:
Caitlin Clark. Image via: John Jones-Imagn Images

Caitlin Clark calls out Indiana Fever's huge social media mishap



Caitlin Clark is set for Fever's regular-season game opener with Wings



Caitlin Clark gives a hilarious 3-word response mocking the Indiana Fever’s PR nightmare following an AI-assisted post that turned a routine team update into a moment fans could not ignore. The Indiana Fever had shared a social media graphic featuring Caitlin Clark and teammate Aliyah Boston, but it did not take long for viewers to notice something was off. Clark saw it too and responded in her own way.The post, which included a broadcast schedule graphic, quickly drew attention for an unusual detail in Clark’s hand. It looked distorted, clearly not natural. The image was later removed, but not before Clark dropped a quick comment that summed up the moment better than any explanation.Caitlin Clark kept it simple and sharp. “New hand alert,” she wrote under the post, a line that instantly spread across social media. It was not harsh, just honest and a little playful. That tone matched her personality, someone who does not shy away from a moment but rarely takes it too seriously.The mistake itself came from an attempt to blend two separate images using an AI tool, according to reports. The goal was to combine Clark and Boston into one clean graphic.Instead, the final product left an obvious flaw. The Fever quietly deleted the post after the reaction picked up.Across sports, teams are experimenting more with AI in creative work. This case showed both the upside and the limits. The technology can move fast, but it still needs a careful eye. Clark’s comment turned what could have been a simple slip into a light moment that fans embraced.While the social media moment grabbed attention, the focus soon returned to basketball. Clark is preparing to lead Indiana into the new season, starting with a matchup against the Dallas Wings on May 9 at Gainbridge Fieldhouse.Her preseason has already brought a brief scare. In a recent game against Dallas, Clark went down after contact and left the floor early. She later reassured reporters she was “fine,” easing any concern around her availability. The team has not placed any restrictions on her heading into the opener.There is a sense of anticipation around this group. Clark enters the season healthy after a disrupted previous year, and expectations are building again. The Fever will look to turn that energy into results, starting with a familiar opponent.
Article Summary: The indiana fever shared a social media graphic featuring caitlin clark and teammate aliyah boston. The post quickly drew attention for an unusual detail in clark’s hand. The image was later removed, but not before clark dropped a quick comment that summed up the moment better than any explanation.

Article Title: ‘Does not make for a pretty sight’: Jamieson’s fiery send-off to Sooryavanshi sparks outrage, debate erupts
Article Text:
Kyle Jamieson gives Vaibhav Sooryavanshi a fiery send-off. (Video grabs)

Early strikes set tone for DC

WATCH: Jamieson's fiery send-off

Rahul, Nissanka seal record chase

Fans reacted strongly to the send-off:

NEW DELHI: A fiery moment involving Kyle Jamieson and teenage prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi stole the spotlight during the IPL 2026 clash between Delhi Capitals and Rajasthan Royals in Jaipur on Friday, triggering a wave of reactions across the cricketing fraternity.Jamieson dismissed the 15-year-old Sooryavanshi for just 4 in the second over with a sharp yorker. While the delivery itself showcased skill and control, it was the celebration that followed that grabbed attention. The New Zealand pacer clapped aggressively and stared down the youngster, delivering a fiery send-off that left many surprised.Former India cricketer Priyank Panchal was quick to react, writing on X: “31-year-old Kyle Jamieson giving a 15-year-old kid a send off after dismissing him. Does not make for a pretty sight. But also shows how much of an impact and fear Vaibhav has instilled amongst the opponents already.”The incident came amid a dramatic start to the match. Mitchell Starc struck in the very first over, removing Yashasvi Jaiswal with a caught-and-bowled effort. Soon after, Jamieson’s dismissal of Sooryavanshi left Rajasthan reeling at 12 for 2.However, RR skipper Riyan Parag responded in style with a counterattacking 90 off 50 balls, silencing critics and steering his side to a competitive 225 for 6.He found crucial support from Dhruv Jurel (42), while Donovan Ferreira’s explosive 47 off just 14 balls added late impetus.Parag, who had been under pressure due to poor form and off-field scrutiny, showed glimpses of his best with a flurry of boundaries, including a stunning sequence against Jamieson and a tennis-like forehand six off T Natarajan.In reply, Delhi Capitals produced a batting masterclass. KL Rahul (75) and Pathum Nissanka (62) stitched a 102-run opening stand in just 9.3 overs, laying the foundation for a record chase.Rahul dazzled with elegant strokeplay, while Nissanka dominated with his pull shots. Despite a brief wobble after Rahul and Nitish Rana fell in quick succession, Ashutosh Sharma and Tristan Stubbs calmly guided DC to 226 for 3 — completing their highest-ever IPL chase.While DC celebrated a crucial win, Jamieson’s send-off remained a major talking point — highlighting both the intensity of competition and the growing aura of young Sooryavanshi.
Article Summary: Kyle jamieson gives vaibhav sooryavanshi a fiery send-off during ipl 2026 clash between delhi capitals and rajasthan royals in jaipur. The new zealand pacer clapped aggressively and stared down the youngster. Former india cricketer priyank panchal was quick to react, writing on x.

Article Title: Jeanie Buss reveals why Lakers kept Luka Doncic trade talk a secret and the reason involves Mark Cuban
Article Text:
Jeanie Buss and Luka Doncic. Image via: Kevork Djansezian/ Getty Images | Luke Hales/ Getty Images

Why Jeanie Buss and the Lakers kept the Luka Doncic trade a secret?



The Lakers and the Dallas Mavericks after the Luka Doncic trade



Jeanie Buss reveals why the Lakers kept Luka Doncic trade talk a secret, and the reason involves Mark Cuban , a decision that still shapes how this blockbuster deal is viewed across the league. More than a year later, the move that brought Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers continues to raise questions, not just about the trade itself but about how it stayed hidden for so long. The answer, as Buss explains, comes down to timing, control, and one influential voice that never got the chance to step in.Back in early January, discussions quietly began between the Lakers and the Dallas Mavericks. There were no leaks, no rumors, no signs that a generational player could be moved. Inside both organizations, only a handful of people knew. That silence proved to be the difference between a completed deal and one that might have collapsed before it ever reached the finish line.For Jeanie Buss, secrecy was not optional. It was essential. “The Dallas team wanted Anthony Davis . And he was on our team. So conversations started [in January], but it was important that they remained private and didn't leak out to the media, because if a player is made aware of a pending trade, it could crater your entire season...Rob Pelinka, our general manager, was able to do that all without leaking to the media. Because I think Mark Cuban might have jumped in front of a train to keep it from happening.”That last line speaks volumes. Mark Cuban still carried influence within Dallas, and Buss believed any hint of the deal reaching him could have changed everything. Internally, even players were kept in the dark. “Nobody knew, including Luka, Anthony Davis, and LeBron James,” Buss said, highlighting how tightly controlled the process was.She expanded further on why that level of discipline mattered. “It was really important to me that we didn't blow up the team. If it had leaked out and the trade hadn't happened, that would be really unfair to the progress that the coaching staff had made with the team. Because it's a huge distraction.”The Lakers pushed forward with Doncic as their centerpiece, climbing into the playoff picture and building around his all-around production. His arrival shifted the franchise’s timeline, giving them a younger star to lead the next phase.Dallas, on the other hand, struggled to stabilize after the move. Nico Harrison, who drove the deal, eventually paid the price as results failed to follow. The roster turned over, the direction changed, and the Mavericks found themselves resetting sooner than expected.
Article Summary: Jeanie buss explains why the lakers kept luka doncic trade talk a secret. The reason involves mark cuban, a decision that still shapes how this blockbuster deal is viewed across the league. Buss: “i think mark cuban might have jumped in front of a train to keep it from happening”

Article Title: 'I don't need to answer critics': Riyan Parag's blunt take after Rajasthan Royals loss
Article Text:
Riyan Parag (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Watch Shikhar Dhawan on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, life after retirement and more Shikhar Dhawan on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, life after retirement and more

NEW DELHI: Coming into the match after being fined 25% of his match fee and handed one demerit point for breaching Level 1 of the IPL’s Code of Conduct - for using a vape inside the dressing room - Riyan Parag ensured he put the controversy behind him when he walked out to bat against Delhi Capitals.The Rajasthan Royals captain looked in ominous touch, smashing a superb half-century. He appeared set for a well-deserved hundred but fell just short, scoring a brilliant 90 off 50 balls, including eight fours and five sixes, to power his side to 225/6 in 20 overs.However, despite the strong total, Delhi Capitals snapped their three-match losing streak with a commanding seven-wicket win.Parag, after the match, made it clear that outside criticism does not bother him, but his primary responsibility is to deliver results for the team."I don't think I need to answer any critics or anyone talking about it. But at the end of the day, my job is to get two points. So my score and my innings don't really matter if we lose the game," Parag said after the match.A blistering 110-run opening stand between KL Rahul (75 off 40) and Pathum Nissanka (62 off 33) laid the perfect foundation for a record 226-run chase, which was calmly finished by Tristan Stubbs (18*) and Ashutosh Sharma (25*) with five balls to spare."I think it was a good score. I thought 200 was a par score here. It was going to slow down a bit, but I think we could have bowled way better in the middle overs, not let them get away a little too much. And then a lot of boundaries in one single over and that repeated. So I felt we missed the trick with that, but no harm with the decision we made," Parag said.Parag had earlier been fined 25% of his match fee and handed a demerit point after he was caught vaping inside the dressing room during his side’s match against Punjab Kings.He admitted to the offence and accepted the sanction imposed by match referee Amit Sharma.Parag was found to have breached Article 2.21 of the IPL’s Code of Conduct, which relates to “conduct that brings the game into disrepute.” The incident occurred during the second innings when he was seen using a vape inside the dressing room.
Article Summary: Riyan parag scores 90 as rajasthan royals beat delhi capitals by seven wickets. Parag had earlier been fined 25% of his match fee and handed a demerit point. He was caught using a vape inside the dressing room during his side’s match against punjab kings.

Article Title: NHL trade rumors intensify as Auston Matthews and William Nylander pushes Toronto Maple Leafs toward significant roster upgrades this offseason
Article Text:
Auston Matthews and William Nylander (Image Via Twitter)

Auston Matthews and William Nylander highlight the Toronto Maple Leafs NHL team priorities

Amidst what was described as exit interviews, Auston Matthews and William Nylander reportedly discussed key issues regarding the roster with the Toronto Maple Leafs, potentially entering what could easily be considered one of the most impactful NHL offseasons the team has ever experienced. Darren Dreger, an insider, reported that both stars requested that the management make the team tougher and more mobile on the offensive side, as the team had yet another dismal season.Such discussions that have been reported have also enhanced NHL trade rumors regarding the franchise. The leadership team in Toronto seems less interested in including more offensively oriented and playmaking forwards and defensemen with their pucks since the management contemplates redefining their roster around Matthews and Nylander and entering the next season.Auston Matthews and William Nylander allegedly said to the Toronto Maple Leafs that they require tougher forwards and movable defensemen.The remarks are allegedly made in team-exit meetings following the challenging season enjoyed by Toronto. According to Darren Dreger , both players do not lose hope in the core of the roster; however, they believe that the team is physically outmuscled and that they do not have an assuring blue line that moves the pucks.These concerns are representative of some of the problems that Toronto has had to deal with over the season, particularly the major games that had the shape of playoffs.The fact that Matthews and Nylander determined the same weaknesses is noteworthy since it provides the management with the first-hand evaluation internally held by two franchise stars.The demand for “dogs up front" (possibly) indicates that Toronto can get more powerful power forwards or veterans of two-ways out of the NHL offseason. In the meantime, the post requesting two mobile defensemen suggests that the organization might become a party to NHL trade rumors and free agency in the next several months.The front office of Toronto is now under pressure. Some speculation about the long-term prospects of Auston Matthews is also quieted in the report.
Article Summary: Auston matthews and william nylander allegedly said to the toronto maple leafs that they require tougher forwards and movable defensemen. Darren dreger, an insider, reported that both stars requested that the management make the team tougher and more mobile on the offensive side.

Article Title: IPL 2026 Points Table after Match 43: DC move up, RR's erratic campaign continues
Article Text:
DC beat RR by 7 wickets (Pic credit: IPL)

Watch Vikram Solanki on GT strategy, pitch & team decisions Vikram Solanki on GT strategy, pitch & team decisions

IPL 2026 Points Table after RR vs DC match:

Position Team M W L NR Points NRR 1 PBKS 8 6 1 1 13 +1.043 2 RCB 9 6 3 0 12 +1.420 3 SRH 9 6 3 0 12 +0.832 4 RR 10 6 4 0 12 +0.510 5 GT 9 5 4 0 10 -0.192 6 DC 9 4 5 0 8 -0.895 7 CSK 8 3 5 0 6 -0.121 8 KKR 8 2 5 1 5 -0.751 9 MI 8 2 6 0 4 -0.784 10 LSG 8 2 6 0 4 -1.106

NEW DELHI: Delhi Capitals registered their highest successful chase in IPL history against Rajasthan Royals on Friday at the Sawai Mansingh Stadium in Jaipur to put a break on their hat-trick of defeats in IPL 2026. DC chased down a record 226 in just 19.1 overs to collect a well-deserved two points.The win propelled DC to sixth spot in the IPL 2026 points table with 8 points from nine games, overtaking Chennai Super Kings, who play Mumbai Indians at home on Saturday.RR's erratic campaign continued as they suffered their fourth defeat in 10 games. Despite the loss, RR remained in fourth spot in the standings, but their net run rate (NRR) dropped to +0.510.Punjab Kings remain atop the standings with 13 points from 8 games, followed by defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru in second with 12 points from nine games. Sunrisers Hyderabad are third with a superior NRR over RR, as all three teams -RCB, SRH and RR, have 12 points each.Gujarat Titans are fifth with 10 points as they march towards the playoff spots while consolidating their mid-table position. GT have reduced the gap with fourth-placed RR to just two points and are two points ahead of DC.The rest of the table remains unchanged. CSK are at seventh with six points, followed by Kolkata Knight Riders at eighth with five points. While, Mumbai Indians are ninth with four points, just ahead of bottom-placed Lucknow Super Giants on NRR.With the league stage entering a crucial phase, the playoff race is heating up. DC have kept themselves in contention with a crucial win against RR on Friday.
Article Summary: Delhi capitals registered their highest successful chase in ipl history against rajasthan royals on friday. Dc chased down a record 226 in just 19.1 overs to collect a well-deserved two points. The win propelled dc to sixth spot in the ipl 2026 points table with 8 points from nine games.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumor: Dallas Cowboys, Green Bay Packers, and Cleveland Browns linked to New Orleans Saints running back Alvin Kamara
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumor: Dallas Cowboys, Green Bay Packers and Cleveland Browns linked to New Orleans Saints running back Alvin Kamara (Image via Getty: Alvin Kamara)

New Orleans Saints RB Alvin Kamara in trade talks with Cowboys, Packers, and Browns

Washington Commanders, Indianapolis Colts, and Cincinnati Bengals tied to Alvin Kamara

Saints running back linked to Kansas City Chiefs and Cleveland Browns

ESPN’s Mike Clay reported on X that Arizona Cardinals RBs James Conner and Trey Benson and New Orleans Saints RB Alvin Kamara “need new homes.”And Mike Clay sees them fit for the Washington Commanders, Indianapolis Colts, Dallas Cowboys, Cincinnati Bengals, Green Bay Packers, Kansas City Chiefs, and Cleveland Browns.Our point of concern? Alvin Kamara for the Dallas Cowboys, the Cleveland Browns, and the Green Bay Packers.As for the Dallas Cowboys? Jerry Jones’ franchise has Javonte Williams penciled in as the starter at running back. But behind him? They have Malik Davis, Jaydon Blue, and Phil Mafah.Bringing in Alvin Kamara could make a lot of sense. He has been a dual threat, recording 7,000-plus rushing yards, 4,900-plus receiving yards, and 86 touchdowns in 126 games.Heavy Sports’ Evan Massey suggests that Alvin Kamara has hinted at the possibility of retirement if the New Orleans Saints traded him away. But Kamara could be an interesting veteran option for the Dallas Cowboys. He could form a solid one-two punch alongside Javonte Williams in the backfield.As for the Green Bay Packers? Heavy Sports’ Evan Massey suggests the Green Bay Packers could consider Alvin Kamara as an elite option for a backup role behind Josh Jacobs.They could consider trading for Alvin Kamara. The asking price may not be too high at this stage of his career.The 30-year-old’s 2026 salary was reduced from $18 million to $10 million by the New Orleans Saints using the CBA’s 50% rule. Also, the Saints signed Jacksonville Jaguars running back Travis Etienne Jr. to a four-year, $52 million contract, which averages $13 million per year.Now, let’s eliminate the listed trade competitors for Alvin Kamara: Washington Commanders? They drafted Kaytron Allen, they signed Rachaad White, and Jerome Ford. So, they don’t need any running back as such.Indianapolis Colts? Now, they could be competition for the Dallas Cowboys and the Green Bay Packers. Because Colts Wire’s Paul Bretl reports that the Indianapolis Colts need a running back. They have Jonathan Taylor. But he needs backup because of injury concerns.They have DJ Giddens and Seth McGowan competing for a backup role. But the duo has limited NFL experience. Signing a veteran could bring stability in pass protection and on special teams.As for the Cincinnati Bengals? According to The Sporting News’ Billy Heyen, talented running backs Jamal Haynes and Kentrel Bullock have been signed by the Cincinnati Bengals as undrafted free agents.As for the Kansas City Chiefs? They signed a Super Bowl-winning running back, Kenneth Walker III, and they drafted a Nebraska Cornhuskers running back in the fifth round as their 161st overall pick, Emmett Johnson.As for the Cleveland Browns? According to 247Sports’ Jack Duffin, the Cleveland Browns need a running back, and they have not added anyone so far. This could mean they heavily depend on 23-year-old Raheim Sanders for 2026. Though his stats do not signify much confidence [58 snaps and 27 carries].Sports Illustrated’s Brian Schaible links Alvin Kamara to the Cleveland Browns. Quinshon Judkins is the centerpiece. Dylan Sampson showed flashes and had a couple of receiving touchdowns. But he’s still adapting to the role.That’s where New Orleans Saints running back Alvin Kamara comes into the picture. He gives the quarterback, whether Shedeur Sanders or Deshaun Watson , an outlet where there is nothing. “He can turn short throws into real gains and keep drives alive,” said Sports Illustrated’s Brian Schaible.That leaves us with, who would sign Alvin Kamara for his 2026 chapter? Or would he retire? Remains to be seen…
Article Summary: Washington commanders, indianapolis colts, and cincinnati bengals tied to alvin kamara. Dallas cowboys, green bay packers and cleveland browns linked to new orleans saints running back. Kansas city chiefs linked to emmett johnson. Arizona cardinals rbs james conner and trey benson “need new homes”

Article Title: Vanessa Bryant shares painful birthday message for Gianna as Kobe Bryant memories return and 20 scholarships revealed
Article Text:
Vanessa Bryant and Gianna Bryant (Image via Getty)

Vanessa Bryant and Gianna Bryant’s legacy lives on through scholarships and family tributes

The day was filled with love and pain for Vanessa Bryant as she marked what would have been her daughter’s 20th birthday. She shared a quiet but emotional post on Instagram, reminding everyone how much she still feels her daughter’s presence, even after all these years. The message was simple, but it carried deep emotion. “Happy birthday to my sweet baby angel, Gianna,” she wrote, alongside a photo of them together. “Words can’t express how much I love and miss you mamacita. Mommy loves you so much!”.The post quickly connected with fans who still remember the young basketball player’s bright future. Gianna Bryant passed away in January 2020 in a helicopter crash with her father, Kobe Bryant . They were on their way to a basketball game in California. She was only 13. The loss shook the sports world and continues to be remembered.This birthday was not just about remembrance. It also became a moment to celebrate Gianna’s dreams. The Mamba & Mambacita Sports Foundation announced something meaningful on the same day. In a video shared online, the foundation revealed that 20 scholarships were given to young athletes in Gianna’s name.The announcement said, “In Gigi’s honor, we are proud to announce the 2026 Class of Gianna Bryant Scholars, 20 exceptional student-athletes from Los Angeles and Orange County, administered in partnership with the California Community Foundation and local Boys & Girls Clubs of America affiliates.”The message ended with, “And to our Gigi, Happy 20th Birthday! Your vision, your spirit, and your beautiful heart continue to light the way. ”Vanessa has kept her daughter’s memory alive in many ways. She often shares family moments with her daughters Natalia, Bianka, and Capri. On this birthday, Natalia Bryant also posted photos of herself with Gianna and wrote, “Happy Birthday Gigi.”Just days earlier, Vanessa had shared photos with Kobe to mark their 25th wedding anniversary. She also remembered him on his birthday last year with another heartfelt message, writing, “We love and miss you and Gigi so much. Sending our love to you. Happy birthday, baby.”Through these moments, Vanessa continues to keep both Kobe and Gianna close, not just for her family but for fans around the world.
Article Summary: Vanessa bryant marked what would have been her daughter's 20th birthday. Gianna bryant passed away in january 2020 in a helicopter crash with her father, kobe bryant. The mamba & mambacita sports foundation announced 20 scholarships in gianna's name.

Article Title: Luke Littler challenges Mo Farah to wild half marathon with 501 darts twist as talks begin to heat up
Article Text:
Luke Littler and Mo Farah (Image Via Getty)

Luke Littler backs himself against Mo Farah in half marathon with darts twist as both stars react to viral challenge

A strange but fun challenge is now picking up attention, and it involves two very different sports coming together. Luke Littler has said yes to a viral idea where he could face Mo Farah in a half marathon. But this is not just about running. The twist is that both of them would need to hit a 501 checkout on a dartboard after every mile.The idea sounds unusual, but it has already caught the interest of fans and even other athletes. Littler spoke about it after his latest Premier League Darts win in Aberdeen. While he seemed excited, he also admitted he would need to get fitter before taking it on. At the same time, Mo Farah has also shown interest, which makes this challenge feel closer to becoming real.Luke Littler gave a very honest and relaxed response when asked about the challenge. He said, “I don’t think Mo Farah could take out 501 personally. So as soon as I am done, nine darter, I am walking my next mile. Yeah, I think we should do it for charity. Obviously let me lose a bit of timber and I’ll be good to go.”His confidence comes from his strength in darts, even though Farah is one of the best long-distance runners in the world.The format would make things interesting. After each mile, both would stop and try to finish a 501 score. That means focus and skill will matter just as much as stamina.Mo Farah, who is now 43, has also reacted positively. Responding to the idea, he said, “I will let my team get in touch with you! Yeeeezzzzzz!! 501.” That short reply was enough to show he is open to the challenge.Farah has a strong background in running. He won Olympic gold in both the 5,000 meters and 10,000 meters at the London 2012 and Rio 2016 Games. His personal best in a half marathon is 59 minutes and 22 seconds, which shows how strong he is over long distances.On the other side, Littler is enjoying a great season in darts. His recent win in Aberdeen was his fifth Premier League victory this season. That result has pushed him to the top of the standings, and he has already secured his place in the playoffs.The idea for this challenge also got support from boxer Dave Allen. Speaking on talkSPORT, he said he even tried to contact Farah to help make it happen.If the event goes ahead, both players would need to complete 13 successful 501 checkouts during the race. That mix of running and darts could make it one of the most unique sporting events fans have ever seen.
Article Summary: Luke littler has said yes to a viral idea where he could face mo farah in a half marathon. The twist is that both of them would need to hit a 501 checkout on a dartboard after every mile. The idea has already caught the interest of fans and even other athletes.

Article Title: Are Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce new part-owners of Kentucky Derby contender The Puma? Mystery deepens after NDA hint
Article Text:
Rumors suggest Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce may own a stake in Kentucky Derby contender The Puma, but nothing is confirmed. Speculation grew after co-owner Michael Iavarone said he could “neither confirm nor deny” due to an NDA. The buzz boosted the horse’s popularity and odds, with fans and bettors closely watching as the Derby approaches.

Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Kentucky Derby rumors gain traction

Michael Iavarone’s cryptic post fuels Swift Kelce speculation

The speculation surrounding Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce has taken an unexpected turn, this time in the high stakes world of horse racing. What began as a murmur of online gossip soon became a roar after a big player linked to a Kentucky Derby hopeful jumped in with both feet. Now fans are watching closely, their curiosity turning into buzz.The intrigue centers on The Puma, a Derby upstart who has surprisingly become the subject of celebrity talk. While there is no official confirmation tying Swift and Kelce to the horse, a cryptic response from co-owner Michael Iavarone has only deepened the mystery and kept fans guessing.The rumor mill kicked into high gear earlier this week when posts began circulating online claiming Swift and Kelce had quietly secured a stake in The Puma. One widely shared message read, “Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift are now 10 percent part owners of Kentucky derby entry The Puma.” That single claim was enough to ignite intense interest, especially among Swift’s massive fan base.And as the chatter continued, more folks started to make the connections. Swift and Kelce’s dabbling in the sport of horse racing added another layer to their already headline-grabbing lives.But in the absence of confirmation, the possibility was enough to make The Puma one of the most talked about names ahead of the race.The conversation reached another level when Iavarone addressed the rumors directly, though without offering clarity. In a message shared online, he wrote, “Ok people. Everyone asking me if Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are partners on The Puma…” before adding, “All I can say is I signed an NDA so I can’t confirm or deny.” The statement, paired with a playful tone, left fans reading between the lines.That ambiguity had a real impact. The Puma’s odds saw a sharp rise midweek, moving from around 10-1 to 7-2 before stabilizing. Some believe the surge was driven by Swift’s fanbase, known for rallying behind anything connected to the pop icon. As one sports commentator noted, “Rumor has it that Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have bought into The Puma. The Swifties could make this horse a top choice on Saturday.”Whether the rumors prove true or not, the buzz has already changed the narrative. The Puma is no longer just a contender. It is now part of a larger cultural moment where sports, celebrity, and speculation collide.
Article Summary: Rumors suggest taylor swift and travis kelce may own a stake in kentucky derby contender the puma. Speculation grew after co-owner michael iavarone said he could “neither confirm nor deny” due to an nda. The buzz boosted the horse’s popularity and odds, with fans and bettors closely watching.

Article Title: IPL 2026 Orange Cap: KL Rahul leapfrogs Abhishek Sharma, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi to the top
Article Text:
KL Rahul (Pic credit: IPL)

Watch Bhuvneshwar Kumar on RCB loss: ‘It was just one off day’ Bhuvneshwar Kumar on RCB loss: ‘It was just one off day’

Poll Is current form of KL Rahul the best of his career? Yes, he is in peak form! No, he has performed better before.

IPL 2026 Orange Cap standings after RR vs DC match:

NEW DELHI: Delhi Capitals opener KL Rahul scored his third half-century of the IPL 2026 season to jump to the top of the Orange Cap standings. His 75 against Rajasthan Royals in Jaipur on Friday took his overall tally this season to 433 runs, eight more than Sunrisers Hyderabad opener Abhishek Sharma.Rahul was outside the top five before the match in Jaipur, but the 40-ball knock helped him leapfrog an array of run-getters like Shubman Gill, Virat Kohli, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Heinrich Klaasen and Abhishek to snatch the Orange Cap.Rahul now has 433 runs from nine games at an average of 54.12 and a strike rate of 185.83, which includes one hundred and three fifties.Sooryavanshi also had a chance to go top, but a rare failure for the 15-year-old sensation — who was out for just 4 on Friday — left the RR opener fourth with 404 runs from 10 games. The teenager has scored his runs at a stunning strike rate of 237.64 this season, including one hundred and two fifties.Abhishek slipped to second with 425 runs from nine games at an average of 53.12 and a strike rate of 209.35, followed by teammate Klaasen in third. Klaasen has 414 runs from nine matches at an average of 59.14 and a strike rate of 157.41.RCB talisman Kohli completes the top five with 379 runs from nine games at an average of 54.14 and a strike rate of 165.50, including three half-centuries. Gill has dropped out of the top five and is now in sixth spot with 373 runs from eight matches.
Article Summary: Delhi capitals opener kl rahul scored his third half-century of the ipl 2026 season to jump to the top of the orange cap standings. His 75 against rajasthan royals in jaipur on friday took his overall tally this season to 433 runs, eight more than sunrisers hyderabad opener abhishek sharma.

Article Title: Kentucky Derby 2026: Full schedule, start time, horses list, when and where to watch, everything you need to know
Article Text:
Kentucky Derby 2026, Fulleffort (via Getty)

Kentucky Derby 2026 venue

Kentucky Derby 2026 when and where to watch?

Kentucky Derby 2026 field and post positions list

Kentucky Derby 2026 winner prize money

The 152nd running of the Kentucky Derby is set to take place on Saturday, May 2. A total of 20 horses will compete in one of the most famous races in horse racing history. This event is known for its rich tradition and high stakes. Fans have been keeping an eye on the race as the field and post positions have been confirmed. The excitement is building as top contenders prepare for the big race.Renegade will enter the race as the early favorite but faces a difficult challenge to kickoff the race from the first position. The inside gate has not produced a winner for decades. Meanwhile, The Puma has gained strong backing in the recent past. Recent history also shows that favorites do not always win this race. This makes the 2026 edition even more unpredictable and exciting.The race will take place at Churchill Downs in Louisville, the traditional home of the Kentucky Derby since it began in 1875. The event is always scheduled for the first Saturday in May. This tradition started in 1932 and has mostly continued since then.The race itself is expected to begin at around 6:57 p.m. ET. However, the exact timing can change slightly depending on pre-race arrangements.Coverage will run throughout the day. NBC will begin broadcasting in the afternoon, while earlier races and coverage will be available through streaming platforms.The field for this year includes strong contenders like Renegade, The Puma, Commandment, and So Happy. Renegade drew the first post position, which is historically difficult. The last winner from this position came in 1986.1. Renegade2. Albus3. Intrepido4. Litmus Test5. Right to Party6. Commandment7. Danon Bourbon8. So Happy9. The Puma10. Wonder Dean11. Incredibolt12. Chief Wallabee13. Silent Tactic (Scratch)14. Potente15. Emerging Market16. Pavlovian17. Six Speed18. Further Ado19. Golden Tempo20. Fulleffort (Scratch)21. Great White22. OcelliThe race also features a total prize purse of $5 million. The winner is expected to earn around $3.1 million. Whereas, the second-place finisher will receive close to $1 million. The prize money has surged significantly in recent years. The surged prize value has made the event even more competitive.
Article Summary: The 152nd running of the kentucky derby is set to take place on saturday, may 2. A total of 20 horses will compete in one of the most famous races in horse racing history. Renegade will enter the race as the early favorite but faces a difficult challenge to kickoff the race from the first position.

Article Title: IPL 2026: ‘Never dreamt of this’- KL Rahul stunned by Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s audacious hitting
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and KL Rahul (Agency Image)

Watch Vikram Solanki on GT strategy, pitch & team decisions Vikram Solanki on GT strategy, pitch & team decisions

Poll Which aspect of T20 cricket do you find most exciting? High-scoring matches Nail-biting finishes

Delhi Capitals’ KL Rahul has heaped praise on Rajasthan Royals ’ teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, calling his rise a sign of how T20 cricket is rapidly evolving with fearless young talent.Speaking on JioStar’s ‘Superstars’, Rahul reflected on the impact Sooryavanshi has already made at just 15 years of age.“It’s phenomenal what the new-age cricketers are doing. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has taken world cricket by storm. Two centuries at the age of 15 is something I never even dreamt of doing,” Rahul said.Sooryavanshi’s numbers back that statement. In IPL 2026, he has scored 400 runs in nine matches at an average of 44.44 and a strike rate of 238.09, including a century and two fifties. His tally of 37 sixes is the highest in the tournament so far, putting him just six away from breaking Abhishek Sharma ’s record of 42 sixes by an Indian in a single IPL season.Rahul also pointed to the broader shift in Indian cricket, highlighting how young players are now embracing an ultra-aggressive mindset and taking on even the very best without hesitation.“The amount of talent coming up in India is scary, especially in T20 cricket. These fearless prodigies are changing the way T20s are played. They don’t fear reputations or match situations,” he said.“Whether it’s a world-class bowler like Jasprit Bumrah or a seasoned campaigner like Pat Cummins , they go after every ball with the same intent. They don’t care if it’s the first over or the last.They just see the ball and want to hit it out of the park. That kind of mindset is rare, and it’s exactly what modern T20 cricket demands.”Sooryavanshi is also on the verge of another milestone. He has already smashed 99 sixes in just 27 T20 innings before turning 20, the most by any batter at that age. One more six will take him to a landmark 100, a feat that could stand for years.Rahul believes the IPL has played a massive role in shaping this new generation of power-hitters.“Five years ago, we weren’t producing as many six-hitting batters as England or Australia. Now, things have changed, thanks to the IPL,” he said.“These guys grew up wanting to hit sixes. When we were young, we had to learn to defend and leave the ball. Hitting in the air meant sitting out of nets. It was a different time. These youngsters practice six-hitting constantly. That’s why they’re so good.”With Sooryavanshi continuing to rewrite expectations at just 15, Rahul’s words underline a larger shift in the game, one where fearless hitting is no longer the exception but the norm.
Article Summary: Kl rahul has heaped praise on rajasthan royals’ teenage sensation vaibhav sooryavanshi. Rahul called his rise a sign of how t20 cricket is rapidly evolving with fearless young talent.rahul also pointed to the broader shift in indian cricket, highlighting how young players are now embracing an ultra-aggressive mindset.

Article Title: Steve McClaren reveals why he told Erik ten Hag to choose between him and Cristiano Ronaldo at Manchester United
Article Text:
Cristiano Ronaldo (via Getty)

Steve McClaren explains why Cristiano Ronaldo could not fit Erik Ten Hag’s system

Former England manager Steve McClaren has made a bold claim about Cristiano Ronaldo ’s final months at Manchester United . He said he advised Erik ten Hag early on that the club would need to make a tough choice between the star forward and the manager’s system. The situation developed during the 2022–23 season, when Ronaldo struggled to fit into Ten Hag’s high-pressing style. The tension later became public and eventually led to a dramatic exit.The Portuguese gave The Athletic an explosive interview where he openly criticized Ten Hag and admitted he did not respect him. Soon after, Manchester United terminated his contract, and Ronaldo joined Al-Nassr in early 2023. McClaren has now explained that the issues were visible long before the public fallout. He also highlighted how Ronaldo found it difficult to adapt to the physical demands required by the manager’s approach.Steve McClaren, who worked closely with Erik Ten Hag during that period, explained that the conflict was mainly about playing style and expectations. He said the manager wanted a very intense pressing system, especially from the forwards. According to McClaren, he told Ten Hag quite early that the situation would come down to a clear decision between sticking with Cristiano Ronaldo or fully committing to the new system.He added that Ronaldo was professional and generally behaved well, but he was not comfortable with the role he was being asked to perform. McClaren explained that the manager wanted him to press aggressively. He wanted him to lead the defensive effort and constantly make repeated runs. However, Ronaldo questioned whether such demands were realistic, especially considering his age and playing style at that stage of his career.McClaren also shared that he had direct conversations with Ronaldo about these expectations. He told the forward that if he wanted to stay in the team, he would need to follow the tactical instructions and work harder without the ball. But Ronaldo was not convinced and often argued that constant pressing was not necessary.The situation eventually became unsustainable. Ronaldo made only limited appearances under Ten Hag and struggled to make an impact. His departure marked the end of an era at Manchester United.Meanwhile, former teammate Antony recently spoke about Ronaldo’s influence off the field. He said Ronaldo often encouraged discussions beyond football, including life lessons and personal growth, which helped younger players develop both professionally and personally.
Article Summary: Steve mcclaren explains why cristiano ronaldo could not fit erik ten hag’s system at manchester united. The former england manager said the conflict was mainly about playing style and expectations. He said the manager wanted a very intense pressing system, especially from the forwards.

Article Title: Cricket Canada appoints Monty Desai as new head coach
Article Text:
Monty Desai (ICC Photo)

Watch Vikram Solanki on GT strategy, pitch & team decisions Vikram Solanki on GT strategy, pitch & team decisions

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

"Honoured to take on this responsibility"

Cricket Canada has ushered in a new era, appointing Monty Desai as the head coach of the men’s national team, with the board calling it a “pivotal moment” for the country’s cricketing future.Desai, a seasoned coach with over two decades of international experience, brings with him a proven track record in Associate cricket. One of his most notable achievements came with Nepal, where he played a key role in helping the side regain ODI status and qualify for multiple ICC global events.Announcing the appointment, Cricket Canada president Arvinder Khosa stressed the importance of long-term vision and structural growth. “Our foremost priority is to restore Cricket Canada’s prominence through performance, professionalism, and a renewed and vitalized sense of purpose,” Khosa said.“Appointing Monty Desai reflects this vision. His experience with Associate nations, most notably Nepal and Afghanistan, demonstrates his ability to transform teams through effective leadership, discipline, and a clear long term plan,” he added.Khosa also highlighted the timing of the move, especially after Canada’s recent appearance at the ICC Men's T20 World Cup.Desai, who has previously worked with the Afghanistan national cricket team and across India’s domestic and franchise circuits, expressed gratitude and optimism upon taking charge.“I am honoured to take on this responsibility and thank Cricket Canada for their trust,” Desai said. “My previous experience in Canada has given me a clear understanding of the system’s potential and the passion that exists for the game.”Emphasising the rise of Associate nations, he added, “Associate cricket is an important driver in the global growth of cricket today, and teams like Nepal and Afghanistan have demonstrated what belief, discipline, and fearlessness can unlock.”“Canada has a similar opportunity, and my focus will be on building a culture that translates this potential into consistent performances on the international stage,” he said.
Article Summary: Monty desai appointed head coach of canada's men's national team. Desai has over two decades of international experience with nepal and afghanistan. Cricket canada president arvinder khosa stresses importance of long-term vision and structural growth.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Starc vs Sooryavanshi in Jaipur! DC overhaul XI in high-stakes clash vs RR
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Mitchell Starc (Agency Image)

Watch Shikhar Dhawan on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, life after retirement and more Shikhar Dhawan on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, life after retirement and more

Starc returns as DC ring changes

RR vs DC Playing XIs:

Delhi Capitals XI:

Rajasthan Royals XI:

NEW DELHI: A marquee battle is set to headline Friday’s IPL 2026 clash as Mitchell Starc makes his season debut for the Delhi Capitals, setting up a mouth-watering contest against teen sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi when they face the Rajasthan Royals in Jaipur.RR skipper Riyan Parag won the toss and opted to bat first at the Sawai Mansingh Stadium, pointing to surface conditions as a key factor.“We're going to bat first. I think it's not the usual Jaipur wicket. It's a bit dry; we noticed that yesterday and the pitch played a little faster the other day. So hopefully it gets a little slow in the back end, so that's why we're batting first. (On the win against Punjab Kings) I think the middle order and lower order finished it like the way they did and the openers as usual started really brilliantly. But as a collective team effort, chasing down 220 always helps. Everyone's stepping up. That has been the motto, like, as I was saying, we haven't been playing proper and complete cricket for 40 overs. Hopefully we can narrow it down as the tournament reaches the business end. Another show today and we can rest for a few days. Bishnoi comes back in and Shubham is into the main team,” Parag said.The bigger headline, however, came from the DC camp, with Starc finally featuring this season, adding firepower to their pace attack.His duel with Sooryavanshi at the top is expected to set the tone early.DC captain Axar Patel confirmed three changes in the XI as the side looks for a turnaround in a tightening playoff race.“Starc is playing, Chameera isn't playing. Pathum is playing, which means David Miller sits out. Ashok Sharma is there, so there are three changes. We have three changes, the wicket looks good and we're happy to chase. It's important to return to basics. You need to stay in the present to turn things around, focus on the positives. Attitude and body language are very important,” Axar said.With both teams making tweaks and chasing consistency, the encounter carries added significance. But the early exchanges promise the biggest thrill — Starc steaming in with pace and precision, and Sooryavanshi ready to counterattack in what could define the contest.KL Rahul(w), Pathum Nissanka, Nitish Rana, Sameer Rizvi, Tristan Stubbs, Axar Patel(c), Ashutosh Sharma, Kyle Jamieson, Mitchell Starc, Kuldeep Yadav, T NatarajanYashasvi Jaiswal, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Dhruv Jurel(w), Riyan Parag(c), Donovan Ferreira, Ravindra Jadeja, Shubham Dubey, Jofra Archer, Ravi Bishnoi, Nandre Burger, Brijesh Sharma
Article Summary: Mitchell starc makes his season debut for delhi capitals against rajasthan royals. Teen sensation vaibhav sooryavanshi set to make his ipl 2026 debut.rr skipper riyan parag won the toss and opted to bat first.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Yashasvi Jaiswal creates first-ball six record but Mitchell Starc has the last laugh
Article Text:
Rajasthan Royals' Yashasvi Jaiswal (ANI Photo)

Watch Shikhar Dhawan on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, life after retirement and more Shikhar Dhawan on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, life after retirement and more

Most times, hitting six on the first ball of an IPL innings

Six off the first ball of an IPL match

Yashasvi Jaiswal added another stunning entry to his growing IPL record book with a six off the very first ball against Delhi Capitals in Jaipur. Facing Mitchell Starc, the left-hander made an immediate statement.Starc began short and in the slot, and Jaiswal was quick to react. Hanging back, he picked the length early and swung it cleanly over backward square leg for a massive six. With that hit, Jaiswal moved to the top of the list for most first-ball sixes in IPL innings, achieving the feat for the fourth time.4 - Yashasvi Jaiswal*2 - Priyansh Arya1 - Naman Ojha1 - Mayank Agarwal1 - Sunil Narine1 - Virat Kohli1 - Robin Uthappa1 - Phil Salt1 - Sanju SamsonHe also joined an elite group of players to hit a six off the very first ball of an IPL match, becoming the latest name on that list.Naman Ojha (RR) off Brad Hodge (KKR), Durban, 2009Virat Kohli (RCB) off Varun Aaron (RR), Bengaluru, 2019Phil Salt (KKR) off Nuwan Thushara (MI), Kolkata, 2024Priyansh Arya (PBKS) off Khaleel Ahmed (CSK), Mullanpur, 2025Yashasvi Jaiswal (RR) off Mitchell Starc (DC), Jaipur, 2026*However, the moment was short-lived. Starc responded immediately, dismissing Jaiswal on the third ball.A full toss caught him by surprise, and his attempted swipe ballooned back to the bowler, handing Starc his first wicket of the season. Rajasthan Royals ’ start worsened when Vaibhav Sooryavanshi fell in the next over for just 4, leaving the hosts under early pressure despite the explosive beginning.Earlier, RR captain Riyan Parag had opted to bat, while Starc returned to action after recovering from a shoulder injury.
Article Summary: Yashasvi jaiswal hit a six off the very first ball against delhi capitals in jaipur. The left-hander moved to the top of the list for most first-ball sixes in ipl innings, achieving the feat for the fourth time. He also joined an elite group of players to hit asix off the first ball of an ipl match.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Why is MS Dhoni missing from CSK dugout? Hussey reveals selfless call
Article Text:
MS Dhoni (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Watch Vikram Solanki on GT strategy, pitch & team decisions Vikram Solanki on GT strategy, pitch & team decisions

Focus on recovery, not attention

Poll Would you support MS Dhoni if he chose to stay away for the rest of the season to help the team? Absolutely, he’s making a wise choice Not really, team needs him

NEW DELHI: The absence of MS Dhoni from the Chennai Super Kings dugout in IPL 2026 has sparked widespread curiosity, but batting coach Michael Hussey has now revealed the selfless reason behind the veteran’s decision to stay away.Speaking ahead of CSK’s marquee clash against Mumbai Indians at Chepauk, Hussey explained that Dhoni consciously chose not to attend matches to avoid becoming a distraction for the team.“He's such a team-oriented guy, MS Dhoni. He always wants what's best for the team, and he was worried that if he came, there'd be a bit too much of a distraction,” Hussey said.“Obviously, the cameras would be on him a lot. The crowd would be cheering for him and things like that. And he really wanted the team to just be able to go about their job, do our thing.”Despite being part of the squad since pre-season, Dhoni — who is recovering from a calf injury — has not featured in a single match so far. His absence on match days, Hussey stressed, was a deliberate attempt to keep the spotlight firmly on the playing group.“Whether that's right or wrong, that's not my decision to sort of make, but that's the thinking behind with Dhoni not wanting to come to the matches,” he added.While Dhoni has stayed away from the dugout, he has remained actively involved behind the scenes, regularly attending training sessions and interacting with players.Hussey also provided a positive update on Dhoni’s recovery, suggesting a return could be imminent — though no firm timeline has been set.“Hopefully, he'll be back as soon as possible. I don't know if it's tomorrow or maybe the next match after that, but he's progressing really well,” he said.“I know he's been upping his running speeds, and that was probably the sticking point. I think we're very confident from a skill perspective with his batting and his wicketkeeping.”“It was just making sure that he could maintain good running power… so as soon as he's got the confidence in his calf, then I'm sure he'll give it the tick to be ready to go,” he explained.
Article Summary: Ms dhoni has not featured in a single ipl match so far this season. Chennai super kings coach michael hussey says dhoni chose not to attend matches to avoid becoming a distraction for the team. Hussey also provided a positive update on dhoni’s recovery, suggesting a return could be imminent.
